items.example: The salary for this position is quite competitive.
My boss is very understanding when I need time off.
The staff at this hotel are very friendly.
I have a difficult task to complete by Friday.
We have a tight deadline for this project.
I decided to apply for a job at a marketing agency.
I have a job interview next Tuesday morning.
My colleague helped me with the presentation.
She works in the sales department.
He got a promotion after working there for three years.
